details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia page, extracted the data correctly, and reported all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023). The 2024 and 2023 results match the known facts exactly. The 2025 data (Clarke, Devoret, Martinis) was retrieved directly from the live Wikipedia page, which now includes 2025 data not in the known facts baseline. All co-laureates were listed for each year.
